message:
security(terminal): extend set_title to filter C1 control characters

Expands the escape sequence injection protection in set_title() to
filter C1 control characters (U+0080-U+009F) in addition to C0 and DEL.

Why this matters:
- C1 contains CSI (U+009B), OSC (U+009D), ST (U+009C) which some
  terminals interpret as control sequences
- An attacker could use these to inject commands via title strings
- char::is_control() covers all three ranges (C0, DEL, C1)

Changes:
- Simplified filtering to use char::is_control() instead of manual range
- Updated doc comments to explain the C1 threat model
- Added test_set_title_filters_c1_controls test
- Added test_is_control_behavior test to verify char::is_control()

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
